CustomField.description: Indicates the adjustment amount carried forward from the previous rent period, representing either an additional rent amount to be debited (if prior rent was understated) or credited (if prior rent was overstated). [LOAD:NO] [JUSTIFICATION:This is a Formula Number Field Created on Rent schedule which will get populated from the existing Rental Credit/Debit Currency Field.] [REPLACEMENT OBJECT API:NA] [REPLACEMENT FIELD API:NA] [COMMENTS:NA]
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Adjustment amount carried forward from the previous rent period.
CustomField.label: Rental Credit/ Debit
